testcase.name: test_lucas_rodriguez_not_in_director_inbox

failure.message: AssertionError: Lucas Rodriguez should NOT be in inbox assert 'athlete_5' not in ['athlete_3', 'athlete_9', 'athlete_6', 'athlete_2', 'athlete_7', 'athlete_4', ...]

testcase.failure: tests/test_risk_engine_seed_data.py:135: in test_lucas_rodriguez_not_in_director_inbox assert "athlete_5" not in athlete_ids, "Lucas Rodriguez should NOT be in inbox" E AssertionError: Lucas Rodriguez should NOT be in inbox E assert 'athlete_5' not in ['athlete_3', 'athlete_9', 'athlete_6', 'athlete_2', 'athlete_7', 'athlete_4', ...]

testcase.name: test_support_pod_olivia_anderson_blocker
testcase.failure: tests/test_risk_engine_seed_data.py:349: in test_support_pod_olivia_anderson_blocker assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Support pod failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Support pod failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_support_pod_lucas_rodriguez_healthy
testcase.failure: tests/test_risk_engine_seed_data.py:361: in test_support_pod_lucas_rodriguez_healthy assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Support pod failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Support pod failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
